home.title: Pesona - AI Character Chat
home.metaDescription: Chat with expressive AI characters in real-time. Meet unique characters across various genres.
home.ogDescription: Chat with expressive AI characters in real-time.

chatList.noChatsHint: Pick a character from Home to start chatting

chat.errorImageGen: Image generation failed — masks have been refunded

myPage.masksDesc: Chat with characters and unlock images
myPage.watchAdAvailable: Watch an ad and get 5 masks
myPage.dailyCheckinDesc: Get free masks once a day
myPage.missionFeedbackDesc: Write a post on the feedback board
myPage.missionReviewDesc: Leave a review on the Play Store

defaultCaptions: A walk sounds perfect on a day like this 🌿

Sometimes it's nice to stop and look at the sky 🌙
Good food always lifts the mood 🍰

character.reviewDesc:
You've started chatting with 3 characters including {{name}}!
A quick review would mean a lot to us.
character.reviewReward: Leave a review and get 10 masks!

about.title: About
about.metaDescription: Pesona is an interactive chat platform where you can talk with emotion-based AI characters in real-time.
about.hero:
Experience immersive conversations
with expressive AI characters
about.feature1Desc: Each character reacts with 10 different emotions (happy, sad, angry, surprised, shy, etc.) — their expressions and sprites change dynamically based on your conversation.
about.feature2Desc: Discover unique AI characters across romance, mystery/RPG, school life, modern fantasy, and more. Each character has their own personality and storyline.
about.feature3Desc: Enjoy natural, immersive conversations through real-time streaming AI chat. Characters stay true to their personality and setting throughout every conversation.
about.feature4Desc: Complete character-specific missions to earn masks. Follow story arcs across ACTs to deepen your relationship with each character.
about.step1: Browse characters on the Home screen
about.step2: Check a character's profile and opening message
about.step3: Tap 'Start Chat' to begin chatting with an AI character

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.notice: Feedback with more likes will be reviewed first by the developer
feedback.empty:
No feedback yet.
Be the first to share!
feedback.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete?
